name: Nestlands
description: A warm, fertile supercontinent where colossal dinosaur herds nest and migrate across golden berry-scrub savanna, gourd-tangled river deltas, fern lowlands, and tar-pit flats. Its scattered human bands never forged metal, hunting the great beasts with bone, stone, and fire. When the herds move, the whole ground shakes.
mood: Sun-baked and teeming, beautiful and lethal. Every meal here is also hunting something far larger than you.
biome: berry-scrub savanna laced with gourd-vine river deltas and dinosaur nesting grounds

enemies.name: Hatchling
enemies.role: fast weak melee that swarms and bites in numbers
enemies.description: A knee-high dinosaur chick with too many teeth.

enemies.name: Scrub Lizard
enemies.role: darting melee that closes fast then skitters back
enemies.description: A dog-sized monitor lizard the color of dry grass.

enemies.name: Sling Hunter
enemies.role: weak ranged poke with a stone sling
enemies.description: A lean nomad whirling a loaded leather sling.

enemies.name: Carrion Bird
enemies.role: flying harasser that pecks exposed targets
enemies.description: A scrawny crested flyer with a blood-stained beak.

enemies.name: Bone Spear
enemies.role: reach melee that holds the front line
enemies.description: A hunter leveling a long bone-tipped spear.

enemies.name: Raptor
enemies.role: fast flanker that pounces from the side
enemies.description: A waist-high pack predator with a hooked killing claw.

enemies.name: Net Hunter
enemies.role: ranged control that entangles and slows one target
enemies.description: A hunter swinging a weighted hide net overhead.

enemies.name: Hide Shield
enemies.role: slow tanky blocker that soaks hits up front
enemies.description: A hunter crouched behind a thick hide-and-bone shield.

enemies.name: Horn Bull
enemies.role: heavy bruiser that charges and knocks back
enemies.description: A massive three-horned dinosaur with a wide bony frill.

enemies.name: Big Raptor
enemies.role: strong pounce that buffs nearby raptors
enemies.description: A scarred raptor twice the size of the rest of the pack.

enemies.name: Bone Shaman
enemies.role: support that heals and enrages nearby allies
enemies.description: A hunter draped in skulls, chanting over a low fire.

enemies.name: Spike Tail
enemies.role: wide tail-sweep that hits several adjacent foes
enemies.description: A plated dinosaur with a heavy, spiked swinging tail.

enemies.name: Tyrant
enemies.role: massive single-target melee with a fearsome crushing bite
enemies.description: A towering tyrannosaur that swallows hunters whole.

enemies.name: Nest Mother
enemies.role: huge tank that tramples and calls in hatchlings
enemies.description: An enormous herd-mother guarding a mound of eggs.

enemies.name: Pteranodon
enemies.role: flying boss that dives and snatches isolated targets
enemies.description: A giant crested flyer with a long spear-like beak.

enemies.name: Hunt Chief
enemies.role: commander boss whose heavy club hits rally the hunters
enemies.description: The hunt's leader, swinging a great tooth-studded club.

items.name: Bone Knife
items.description: A short blade carved from a sharpened rib bone.

items.name: Obsidian Blade
items.description: A glassy black blade knapped to a razor edge.

items.name: Tooth Sword
items.description: A wooden blade set with rows of raptor teeth.

items.name: Bone Spear
items.description: A straight shaft tipped with sharpened bone.

items.name: Flint Spear
items.description: A spear with a heavy flint point that punches through hide.

items.name: Goring Spear
items.description: A long lance tipped with a curved horn.

items.name: Hunting Bow
items.description: A simple bow of bent wood and sinew.

items.name: Sinew Bow
items.description: A recurve bow strung with twisted gut for extra snap.

items.name: Horn Bow
items.description: A composite bow of layered horn that hits hard at range.

items.name: Ash Staff
items.description: A fire-charred staff that channels a shaman's spirit-calls.

items.name: Antler Staff
items.description: A forked antler staff that crackles with spirit force.

items.name: Skull Staff
items.description: A staff topped with a raptor skull that shrieks when swung.

items.name: Stone Club
items.description: A heavy stone head lashed to a thick haft.

items.name: Bone Maul
items.description: A two-handed hammer of fused vertebrae.

items.name: Jaw Club
items.description: A club made from a predator's tooth-lined jawbone.

items.name: Tail Club
items.description: A great bludgeon cut from an armored dinosaur's tail.
